International Bootcamp · Singapore · A CAS Experience

A Singapore bootcamp built around your school.

A fully managed, safety-first international programme for your Diploma Programme students, designed as a genuine CAS experience. Choose the number of days that works for your school calendar, and we build the whole programme around it — flights, accommodation, learning, sport, visits, meals and every transfer in between.

It already happened

We ran the first edition in Singapore this summer. Here is what it looked like.

The bootcamp is not a concept or a pilot. The summer 2026 edition ran end-to-end in Singapore with a cohort of students from across Asia. Every element below was delivered on the ground by the Comet team.

June 2026First edition delivered in Singapore, end to end, by the Comet team. Zero incidents. Full cohort.
6 countriesStudents from six countries in one cohort, working together across campus visits, industry sessions and team projects.
Team showcasesEvery student presented a team project on the final day. Parents and mentors attended the closing ceremony.

See what students built

Watch the project showcases from the summer edition.

Every team presented a live project on the final day. Real ideas, real delivery, real confidence. See it for yourself.

Watch the showcases →

Straight from the summer edition

What a week actually looks like.

Real moments from the June 2026 cohort in Singapore: structured research sprints, top university campus tours, city excursions, and a closing showcase where every team presented what they built.

What parents said

The families who sent their children said it best.

From first-time parents nervous about sending their child abroad, to families who saw real, lasting confidence when their child returned.

As a first-time parent sending my child abroad alone, I was nervous. The updates were constant and I always knew she was safe and looked after. That peace of mind was everything.

Parent of a Grade 11 student · Summer cohort

He came back more confident and independent than I have seen him in years. He is still talking about his team and the project they built together.

Parent of a Grade 12 student · Summer cohort

Everything was taken care of — flights, food, the hotel, the trips. As a parent you just hand over and trust, and they earned that trust completely.

Parent of a Grade 10 student · Summer cohort

The mix of a real university experience and genuine fun was perfect. She learned a lot, made friends from around the world, and had the time of her life.

Parent of a Grade 11 student · Summer cohort

Illustrative of feedback from summer families. Verified quotes and references available on request.

What comes next

The winter edition is now open to schools globally.

Building on the summer success, we are opening the next edition to partner schools worldwide. For schools that want an exclusive cohort, the programme can run at any time of year that suits your calendar. For schools looking to join a shared international cohort, we run global editions in summer and winter. Either way, the length, mix and programme are entirely customizable around your students.

→

Your school, your programme, our operations.

Every school we work with gets a programme built around their students — their grade levels, their CAS requirements, their vacation window. The experience is entirely managed by Comet on the ground, so your school focuses on selecting the right students and we handle everything from there.

★

Theme park day (one of the planned activities)

A full day at one of Singapore's top theme parks is among the planned highlights — the exact venue is confirmed once the programme is finalised with the school.

◆

Top university campus visits

Access to Singapore's leading university campuses, with sessions led by faculty and current students.

●

Sports, bonding and city excursions

Daily activity, team challenges and guided city exploration woven through the week.

Built for DP students

Every day generates outcomes students can actually use.

For Diploma Programme students, the bootcamp is designed to generate genuine Creativity, Activity and Service experiences, with tangible material students can log, reflect on and take into their CAS portfolios.

C

Creativity

Team projects, research sprints and a final showcase push students to design, build and present original ideas under real deadlines.

A

Activity

Daily sport, group fitness, a theme park day and full-day excursions keep students physically active throughout the week.

S

Service

Collaborative, community-minded challenges give students structured opportunities to contribute and reflect on impact.

CAS experiences are structured with reflection in mind, so students leave with material they can take straight into their CAS portfolio.

What students leave with

A certificate, a portfolio, and a week they will not forget.

On completion, students receive an official certificate from one of Singapore's leading universities. They also leave with documented CAS experience, a completed team project, new international friendships, and confidence that only comes from doing something genuinely challenging away from home.

University certificate from a top-ranked Singapore institution
Documented CAS portfolio material across all three strands
A completed team research project and presentation
Exposure to Singapore's university and industry environment
Stronger independence, communication and leadership skills
An international peer network across the cohort

What the programme covers

Everything managed. Nothing left for the school or parents to arrange.

Every element below is included in the programme fee. The mix and depth are customizable to your students and your chosen number of days. Once you confirm, we take care of the rest.

University campus visits

Full days on the campuses of leading Singapore universities, seeing academic life up close.

Courses by professional trainers and faculty

Structured learning sessions delivered by experienced trainers and university faculty.

Industry visits

Inside real Singapore workplaces, connecting classroom concepts to how industries actually run.

Theme park day

A full day at one of Singapore's top theme parks, planned as a highlight of the week. Venue confirmed with the school at programme sign-off.

Sports and team bonding

Active sessions and group challenges woven through the week so students recharge and connect.

4-star accommodation

Students stay together in a 4-star property, supervised throughout the week.

Return flights

Round-trip flights from your city, booked and managed for the full group.

All meals

Breakfast, lunch and dinner every day, with dietary requirements catered for.

All transfers and transport

Airport transfers and dedicated transport for every visit and activity.

And more

Cultural experiences and the small touches that make a week memorable. We walk every school through the full programme before confirming.

A sample shape of the week

An example arc, not a fixed schedule.

The programme length is completely customizable. The seven-day flow below is one example of how the days can come together. Add or remove days and the mix of campus visits, industry visits, courses and activities flexes with it.

01

Arrival and orientation

Fly in, settle into the hotel, meet the trainers, form teams.

02

Campus visit one

A full day on a leading university campus, plus first learning sessions.

03

Theme park day

A full day at one of Singapore's leading theme parks. Exact venue confirmed at sign-off.

04

Courses and industry visit

Morning classroom sessions, then inside a real Singapore workplace.

05

Campus visit two and sports

A second university campus, faculty sessions, and afternoon sports.

06

Industry visit two

Second industry visit, followed by final team project sprints.

07

Showcase and departure

Teams present their projects, then the flight home.

Illustrative only. The number of days is yours to set, and the full day-by-day plan is customized and shared with the school once the total number of days is locked.

Safety first, always

Supervised end to end. Zero compromises.

Students are supervised from the moment they leave home to the moment they return. The summer edition ran with a clean safety record, and every element of the winter programme is built around the same standards.

✓

24/7 supervision

Trained programme staff accompany students throughout the week, day and night.

✓

Vetted partners and venues

4-star accommodation, licensed transport and established venues, all pre-checked.

✓

Clear parent communication

Regular updates and a direct line to programme staff for the full duration of the trip.

✓

Emergency protocols

Medical, contact and contingency procedures in place and briefed before departure.

Working together

Your school nominates. Comet handles the rest.

The school's role is straightforward. You identify the students, share the programme, and confirm the dates. Everything else — logistics, operations, on-ground supervision — is on us.

Your school

  • Confirms the vacation window and preferred number of days
  • Nominates the participating cohort (Grade 10, 11 or 12)
  • Shares the programme with students and parents
  • Nominates accompanying school staff, if preferred

Comet

  • Builds the full custom itinerary and handles all bookings
  • Flights, visa support, accommodation and all transport
  • Trainers, faculty sessions, campus and industry access
  • On-ground supervision, safety protocols and parent communication

For your school

The more students who join, the more the school gains.

When you bring a cohort to Singapore, we bring your team along too. These are included on top of the student programme, at no extra cost to the school.

15+ students

One person from your school team, fully covered

Bring a cohort of 15 or more and one member of your school management or counseling team travels to Singapore on an all-expenses-paid trip: flights, stay, meals and transfers included.

25+ students Best value

Two people from your school team, both covered

At 25 or more students, we cover an all-expenses-paid trip for two members of your school management or counseling team. They see the programme first-hand, alongside your students.

Rewards apply to a single confirmed cohort. Coverage matches student inclusions: flights, 4-star accommodation, all meals, transfers and transport.

Get started

Three steps to confirm your school's place.

Step 1

Confirm window and days

Share your preferred travel window and how many days you would like. We hold the slot and start building your custom plan around it.

Step 2

Size the cohort

The all-inclusive fee is priced per student and depends on the total cohort size. An indicative count lets us confirm the exact price.

Step 3

Parent information session

We run a short session for parents covering the full itinerary, safety protocols and student outcomes.

Cohort spots fill fast. Locking your school's place early gives your students the best week.
